problem_statement: The selected read-only worker path has binding, lease-preflight, rehearsal receipt, and operator-visible projection evidence, but the next runtime proof thread still lacks a governed handoff packet that states what a future runtime receipt emitter must prove before dispatch can be admitted.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeReceiptHandoff validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the handoff binds the selected worker path to binding, lease preflight, rehearsal receipt, and console projection evidence
runtime receipt emitter registration remains denied
future dispatch admission is blocked until runtime runner evidence, active lease evidence, UAO evidence, Phi_gov authorization, and failure-receipt obligations exist
focused tests reject authority drift, guard drift, source-ref drift, schema-ref drift, count drift, and terminal-closure drift
non_goals: no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: runtime receipt emission handoff is a contract artifact and not a live runtime emitter
future runtime admission must still require temporal lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, recovery evidence, and verification
WorkerFailureReceipt remains mandatory for failed or partial dispatch evidence
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: focused pytest receipt for handoff behavior
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
